title: Holistic Vision
definition: A comprehensive perspective that encompasses the moral, technical, and scientific aspects of a project to ensure its overall success and alignment with core values.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A leader's ability to see the big picture and consider not just the technical aspects but also the ethical implications of a project.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A mindset that emphasizes the importance of understanding and considering all factors, from morality to technology, in achieving a project's goals.
difficulty_levels.expert: A novel approach to project management that recognizes the interconnectedness of different aspects and focuses on maintaining harmony between them.

extra_fields.insight: The idea that a successful project requires considering all factors, not just technical competence.
